subject: english
textbook: 义务教育教科书·英语（三年级起点）五年级下册

passages.title: Unit One
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: I often get up at 7 o’clock.
When do you start class in Spain?
I always start class at 8 o’clock.

passages.title: My day
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: What do you do on the weekend?
I often clean my room and wash my clothes.
Sometimes I play ping-pong with Zhang Peng.
Today is Sunday! What do you do on the weekend?
I often go shopping with my mum.

passages.title: Let's talk
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Zhang Peng: When do you finish class in the morning?
Pedro: We finish class at 1 o’clock.
Pedro: Then we eat lunch at home.
Zhang Peng: Wow! When do you go back to school after lunch?
Zhang Peng: When do you usually eat dinner in Spain?
Zhang Peng: Wow! That’s too late!
Shopkeeper: Why are you shopping today?
Sarah: My mum worked last night. So I’m shopping today.
Shopkeeper: Good girl! So what do you do on the weekend?
Sarah: I often watch TV and play ping-pong with my father.
Shopkeeper: That sounds like a lot of fun.
Sarah: Yes, but I’m also hard-working.
Shopkeeper: You’re so busy! You need a robot to help you!
Mr Jones: Do you like the music, children?
Mike: Yes. It’s very beautiful. What is it?
Mr Jones: The Four Seasons. Today we’ll draw the seasons. Which season do you like best, Mike?
Mr Jones: I like snow, too. Which season do you like best, Wu Binbin?
Oliver: I like autumn. I really like the colours.
Chen Jie: I like autumn, too. We usually have a school trip in autumn.
Oliver: Great! When is the trip this year?
Chen Jie: It‛s in October. We‛ll go to the Great Wall.
Oliver: Cool! I love the Great Wall!
Mr Jones: There are some other special days in May.
Mr Jones: The school art show and the reading festival.
Zhang Peng: When is the art show?
Zhang Peng: It’s May Day. When is the reading festival?
Zhang Peng: Wow! May is fun!
Chen Jie: When is your birthday?
Mike: My birthday is on April 4th.
Chen Jie: That’s my mother’s birthday, too!
Mike: Cool! What will you do for your mum?
Chen Jie: I’ll cook noodles for her.
Chen Jie: Please come then. We can have a birthday party for both of you!
Chen Jie: The yellow picture is mine.
Chen Jie: Are these all ours?
Chen Jie: Wow! That picture of Beijing is beautiful.
Chen Jie: Look! There is a picture of Shanghai, too.
Chen Jie: Oh, yes! It’s his.
Chen Jie: He’s in the kitchen.
Sam: Can I play with him now?
Chen Jie: Can you take him to the park?
Chen Jie: Look at the pandas.
Chen Jie: Haha. They’re eating lunch!
Mike: Oh, yes! They like bamboo.
Chen Jie: What’s the little monkey doing?
Mike: It’s playing with its mother!
Chen Jie: Do you see any elephants?
Mike: Yes! Look there! The elephant is drinking water.
Tom: My name is Tom. What’s your name?
John: Shh. Talk quietly. I’m John. I can show you the English books.
Tom: OK. Can I read the books here?
John: Yes. Keep your desk clean.

passages.title: Robin’s play
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Robin is in a play. He is Robinson Crusoe. Here is a letter from him.
I always get up early every day.
I wash my face, and then I eat breakfast.
Sometimes I clean my cave, too.
I often go swimming in the water.
In the afternoon, I play sports with my friend.

passages.title: Story time
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Zip: It’s Saturday now. Zoom, I’m always very busy.
Zip: Let me see. From Monday to Wednesday, I usually collect nuts in the afternoon.
Zip: On Thursday, I often dry my nuts in the sun.
Zip: On Friday, I eat nuts with my friends.
Zoom: What do you usually do on the weekend?
Zip: I often watch TV, but this weekend I have a show. I’ll play the pipa.
Zip: Saturday, at 12 o’clock. Oh, no!
Zoom: Look at my summer vacation plan!
Zip: It’s April now. The summer vacation is still three months away.
Zoom: Early planning is always good.
Zoom: In July I’ll visit my grandparents. They live in Xinjiang.
Zip: What will you do there?
Zoom: We’ll go to Grape Valley. The grapes there are very sweet! Grapes are my favourite fruit!
Zoom: In August, I’ll go to Huangshan Mountain. The trees there are very famous. The clouds are beautiful!
Zip: You have a great plan, but what will you do this weekend?
Zip: There will be a maths test next Monday. So please study hard.
Zoom: Oh my goodness! I forgot!

passages.title: Read and match
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Spring is green with flowers and songs.
Summer is hot and the days are long.
Autumn is golden and farmers are busy.
Winter is white and the year is gone.

passages.title: Let’s talk
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Miss White: I like the trees.
Miss White: The colours are very pretty!
Amy: The weather is good and the colours are beautiful!
Amy: Which season do you like best, Miss White?
Miss White: Because I like summer vacation!
Mike: We have a few fun things in spring.
Mike: After the sports meet, we have an English party.
Zhang Peng: When is the party?
Mike: We have a school trip, too.

passages.title: Read and write
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Look at the green trees and pink flowers.
I like spring because there are beautiful flowers everywhere.
The weather is hot, hot, hot!
I like summer, but I can’t swim.
The leaves fall and fall and fall.
Wow! I want to paint a picture, too!
I like winter because I can play in the snow.

passages.title: Story time
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Zoom: What do you usually do on Christmas Day?
Koala: I usually go to the beach and swim in the sea!
Koala: Christmas is in summer in Australia, so we never have snow for Christmas.
Zoom: Which season do you like best?
Music teacher: The singing test will be on May 4th.
Zip: Will you come to the party?
Zoom: I want to practise my song.
Rabbit: Will you play football with me after lunch?
Zoom: I want to practise the song.
Cat: The show is very funny!
Zip: Why are they looking at us?
Zip: Look! They’re taking pictures, too.
Zoom: Yes. The gorilla is great!
Zip: Wow! The gorilla is eating a banana.
Zoom: It’s so big and strong.

passages.title: Let's learn
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: It's usually in September or October. I'll eat mooncakes with my family.

passages.title: English Party
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: You will meet Robin the Robot.
He is a great English teacher!
RSVP: Will you come to the party?
Please send an email by March 23rd.

passages.title: Sarah’s weekend
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Hi, Oliver. This is Wu Binbin. Are you free this ...?

passages.title: Recycle 1
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Robin: Do you work at night?
Sarah’s father: Yes, I’m a doctor. I often work at night.
Robin: When do you go to bed, then?
Robin: Wow! When do you eat lunch?
Robin: When do you go to work?
Robin: Oh! You must be very tired. Breakfast is ready. Please enjoy it!

passages.title: Stella's reply
passages.author: Stella
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: It is autumn in April here in Sydney.
It is warm in the day and cool at night.
Many people visit us in autumn because they like the weather.
When you come, you can visit the Sydney Opera House.
It is the most famous building in Australia.
What is the weather like in April in your city?

passages.title: Bed in Summer
passages.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: In winter I get up at night
In summer, quite the other way,
I have to go to bed by day.
I have to go to bed and see
The birds still hopping on the tree,
Or hear the grown-up people’s feet
Still going past me in the street.
And does it not seem hard to you,
When all the sky is clear and blue,
And I should like so much to play,
To have to go to bed by day?

passages.title: Two new kittens
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: My cat has two new kittens.
They are pink because they are very young.
The kittens are six days old.
They make noises when they are hungry.

passages.title: Robin at the zoo
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Sarah and Robin are at the zoo.
What are you doing here, Robin?
I want to be a bird!
Robin, do you want to swim like a fish?
No! No! I don’t want to be a fish!

passages.title: Unit Six
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Haha. Look! They’re eating lunch! They’re so cute.

passages.title: Work quietly!
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: She’s listening to music in the classroom.

passages.title: The world robot exhibition
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Ni hao. Ni zai gan shen me ne?
Oh, hello. What are you doing?
I’m drawing a picture. Have a look.
Yes. I’m cooking rice. Asako is making sushi.
Can we play music with you?
You’re so cool! Can you teach me?
Yes, I am. I’ll show you.

passages.title: Mike's summer camp
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Mike's mum: Be a good boy.

passages.title: Read the chant
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Thirty days has September, April, June and November;
Except in leap year. That’s the time

passages.title: A game: Animals and dates
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Pandas, pandas and pandas. Tell me when Children’s Day comes.
Monkeys, monkeys and monkeys. Tell me when your birthday comes.

passages.title: I’m in the picture
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Winter. It is my favourite season.

passages.title: Zip and Zoom
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: This is Fido’s. The green one is his.

passages.title: Read the sentences
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Where is the monkey going on Thursday?
He’s swimming in the park in the south.
What is the monkey doing on his birthday?
I think he’s playing and drinking with his friends.

passages.title: My weekend
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: I like to do things on the weekend.
I clean my room and go shopping at the mall.
I have a music class and do exercises.
I play football and play basketball.

passages.title: The twelve months
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Tell me when your birthday comes.
Please tell me when it‛s your birthday.

passages.title: When is your birthday?
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: My birthday is in January. My birthday is in January.
My birthday is in January. It‛s on January 1st.
My birthday is in August. My birthday is in August.
My birthday is in August. It‛s on August 5th.

passages.title: Animals, animals are everywhere
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: Some are climbing, some are jumping,
A dog, a rabbit, a bear.
Some are eating, some are sleeping,

passages.title: School days
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: We come to work and play.
We need to work and talk quietly.
We need to keep our desks clean.
We need to take turns to talk.
And you will be a good student at school.

passages.title: Proverbs
passages.speaker: dylan
sentences: The early bird catches the worm.
春有百花秋有月，夏有凉风冬有雪。
these are the three days of man.
人生有三天：昨天、今天和明天。
It’s the empty can that makes the most noise.

_review_checklist: 1) 对照原 PDF 核对每一句，尤其注意错字 / 漏字 / 拼音
2) 删除非课文内容（练习题、词语表等误抓）
